import React from 'react'; import './RecentUsersTable.css'; interface UserData { id: number; name: string; planName: string; email: string; phone: string; status: 'Active' | 'Inactive' | 'Pending'; joiningDate: string; avatar: string; } const RecentUsersTable: React.FC = () => { const users: UserData[] = [ { id: 1, name: "Alexandra Deff", planName: "Premium Plan", email: "alex.deff@email.com", phone: "+1 (555) 123-4567", status: "Active", joiningDate: "Dec 15, 2024", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494790108755-2616b612b786?w=40&h=40&fit=crop&crop=face" }, { id: 2, name: "Edwin Adenike", planName: "Basic Plan", email: "edwin.a@email.com", phone: "+1 (555) 234-5678", status: "Active", joiningDate: "Nov 28, 2024", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=40&h=40&fit=crop&crop=face" }, { id: 3, name: "Isaac Oluwatemiloun", planName: "Pro Plan", email: "isaac.o@email.com", phone: "+1 (555) 345-6789", status: "Pending", joiningDate: "Dec 20, 2024", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1500648767791-00dcc994a43e?w=40&h=40&fit=crop&crop=face" }, { id: 4, name: "David Oshodi", planName: "Premium Plan", email: "david.oshodi@email.com", phone: "+1 (555) 456-7890", status: "Inactive", joiningDate: "Oct 10, 2024", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1472099645785-5658abf4ff4e?w=40&h=40&fit=crop&crop=face" }, { id: 5, name: "Sarah Johnson", planName: "Free Plan", email: "sarah.j@email.com", phone: "+1 (555) 567-8901", status: "Active", joiningDate: "Jan 05, 2025", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=40&h=40&fit=crop&crop=face" } ]; return (

Recent Users

{users.map((user) => ( ))}
User's Name Plan Name Contact Info Status Joining Date
{user.name}
{user.planName}
{user.email}
{user.phone}
 {user.status} {user.joiningDate}
); }; export default RecentUsersTable;
